title: Zehneria platysperma

It belongs to the genus Zehneria, which is a group of plants native to tropical and subtropical regions. The family Cucurbitaceae is a large and diverse group of plants commonly known as gourds or cucurbits. These plants are characterized by their climbing or trailing habit and the production of small, yellowish flowers. The classification of Zehneria platysperma is further supported by its morphology and genetic relationships with other members of the genus and family.
